artifacts.summary: 4-phase plan to create 3 new tasks (generic MCS foundations, modal metalogic, temporal metalogic) with dependency analysis and ROADMAP.md updates

memory_candidates.content: When structuring metalogic across multiple logic systems (propositional, modal, temporal, bimodal), the validated pattern is 'share definitions, not proofs'. Generic definitions (Consistent, SetMaximalConsistent, Lindenbaum skeleton) belong in a shared Foundations/Logic/Metalogic/ directory (~200-300 lines). Deduction theorems, soundness, and completeness remain per-logic because they require structural induction on concrete DerivationTree inductives and quantify over logic-specific semantic models. This matches the FormalizedFormalLogic/Foundation project's approach and avoids over-abstraction via typeclasses like HasDeductionTheorem.
